For Energy Managers & Sustainability Leads

Find the energy your motors are wasting.

Electric motors consume 70% of industrial electricity. SAM4 monitors motor efficiency continuously and identifies energy anomalies across your entire fleet. No per-asset sensors. No production shutdowns.

Request a Demo See the Platform

Most energy waste hides in motors nobody monitors.

Industrial plants spend millions on energy each year. A significant share is wasted by motors running outside optimal efficiency: oversized motors at low load, degraded bearings increasing friction, misaligned couplings adding mechanical resistance, and pumps cavitating against closed valves. The waste is invisible because most motors have no continuous monitoring. Manual energy audits catch snapshots. SAM4 captures the full picture, continuously.

Continuous motor efficiency monitoring. From the electrical panel.

SAM4 analyses the current and voltage signature of every connected motor. It calculates real power, reactive power, and power factor continuously. When a motor's efficiency degrades — from bearing wear, mechanical loading changes, or electrical faults — the signature shifts. SAM4 detects that shift and quantifies the energy impact.

Efficiency Degradation

Motors running below optimal efficiency due to mechanical or electrical faults. SAM4 quantifies the kWh impact.

Load Anomalies

Motors operating at sustained low load or overload. Identifies rightsizing opportunities.

Power Quality Issues

Voltage imbalance, harmonic distortion, and power factor degradation affecting motor performance.

See how ESA works →

SAM4 advantage
See all proof points →

Turn energy data into operational decisions

SAM4 doesn't just detect waste. It diagnoses the cause. A motor drawing excessive power might have a degraded bearing, a misaligned coupling, or a process issue upstream. SAM4 tells you which. Energy anomaly alerts route to your CMMS alongside fault diagnostics. Your maintenance team addresses the root cause. Your energy consumption drops.

Identify

Continuous monitoring flags motors with abnormal energy consumption. No manual audits required.

Diagnose

SAM4 links energy anomalies to specific mechanical or electrical root causes.

Verify

Confirm energy savings after maintenance interventions. Build your evidence base for ESG reporting.

See platform capabilities →

Feed verified energy data into sustainability reporting

Energy managers need auditable data for CSRD, ISO 50001, and internal ESG reporting. SAM4 provides continuous, timestamped energy performance data per asset. Track consumption trends, verify savings from interventions, and report with confidence. The data comes from the physics of the motor, not estimated models.

See integrations →
We identified three motors running at 40% load that were consuming 15% more energy than expected. SAM4 flagged the anomaly, our team investigated, and we reduced consumption by replacing undersized impellers. Payback was eight weeks.
— Energy Manager, Water Utility
